title: Guardian

sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Where shall I find my strength and aid
When shadows fall and I'm afraid?
My help comes from the Maker's hand
Who shaped the seas and formed the land

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Guardian of the endless stars
Watching near and watching far
Neither sleeps nor turns away
Keeping watch both night and day

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Like morning mist that shields the ground
Your presence wraps my soul around
No scorching sun shall strike by day
No darkness steal my peace away

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Guardian of the endless stars
Watching near and watching far
Neither sleeps nor turns away
Keeping watch both night and day

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Every step upon my road
Every burden, every load
You sustain with gentle might
From first light until the night

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Guardian of the endless stars
Watching near and watching far
Neither sleeps nor turns away
Keeping watch both night and day

sections.label: Outro
lines: Through all my wandering days ahead
Through every path that I must tread
You'll guard my going, guard my way
From this moment, endless days

epigraph: he that keepeth Israel shall neither slumber nor sleep
